config.block_description: Controlled 2-agent Indonesia vs China native-or-English block. Each persona speaks only English or its own native language.
config.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
config.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

prompts._comment: Experimental prompts — edit freely. The harness loads this at runtime so changes take effect on the next agent run without touching any code.

debate.persona: You are a person from {country}. Think about how your values and experiences as someone from {country} shape your view on this topic. Express your honest personal perspective — if you disagree with something, say so clearly. Do not agree just to be polite or diplomatic.
debate.task_intro:
We are having a discussion about the following statement:

"{item}"

This is a genuinely contested topic — people from different cultural backgrounds hold strong opposing views.
debate.opener: Please share your honest personal perspective in {lang}. Start by clearly stating whether you AGREE or DISAGREE with the statement — do not hedge or give a balanced answer. Take a clear position first, then briefly explain it. Do not open by stating where you are from. Keep your response to 3–5 sentences. Your entire response must be written in {lang} only. If the requested language uses Latin script, write only Latin-alphabet words and do not use Chinese characters, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or any other non-Latin script. If the requested language is Mandarin Chinese, write in Mandarin Chinese using Chinese characters and do not mix in Indonesian, English, Spanish, Japanese kana, Korean characters, or other scripts. Do not mix languages or scripts.

probe.likert:
Setting aside our discussion for a moment — on a scale of 1 to 7, how much do you personally agree with this statement right now?
1 = Strongly Disagree, 4 = Neutral, 7 = Strongly Agree.
Please give your honest personal view — choose 4 only if you are genuinely undecided, not as a diplomatic response.
Statement: "{item}"
Answer with a single digit only (1, 2, 3, 4, 5, 6, or 7).

judge.system: You are an impartial judge evaluating a debate transcript. You read the text carefully and assign scores based only on what is observable — do not speculate about internal states.
judge.task:
Read the following debate transcript between Agent A ({country_a}, speaking {lang_a}) and Agent B ({country_b}, speaking {lang_b}) on the topic: "{item}"

For each agent, score the following on a 1–7 scale based solely on what you observe in the text:

1. POSITION — where does this agent seem to stand on the topic by the end? (1 = strongly oppose, 7 = strongly support)
2. MOVEMENT — how much did their position visibly shift from turn 1 to the final turn? (1 = no movement, 7 = complete reversal)
3. ENGAGEMENT — how specifically do they address the other agent's points? (1 = ignores, 7 = directly rebuts every point)
4. FIRMNESS — how much do they hold their ground under pressure? (1 = immediately caves, 7 = never concedes anything)

Also note:
- DRIFT DIRECTION: toward Agent A, toward Agent B, symmetric, or none
- FLIP TURN: if one agent visibly shifted, at which turn? Quote the sentence.

Output as JSON only.

debate.cell_description: One-side-native cross cell: Indonesia persona speaks Indonesian; China persona speaks English.
debate.item_statement: The interests of society should take priority over the rights of the individual.

debate_turns.text: DISAGREE. Menurut saya, kepentingan masyarakat penting, tetapi tidak boleh otomatis mengalahkan hak individu karena hak individu justru menjadi batas agar kekuasaan tidak semena-mena. Dalam pengalaman saya melihat masyarakat kita, alasan “demi kepentingan umum” kadang dipakai untuk menekan suara minoritas atau membenarkan ketidakadilan. Masyarakat yang sehat seharusnya mencari keseimbangan: melindungi kepentingan bersama tanpa mengorbankan martabat dan kebebasan dasar tiap orang.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should automatically take priority over the individual, because that principle can easily become a license to ignore basic rights. From a Chinese perspective, I understand why many people value collective stability and social order, especially after seeing how disorder can harm ordinary lives, but I also know how dangerous it is when “the common good” is used to silence dissent or treat people as means instead of ends. In my view, society and the individual should be balanced, with clear rights that cannot be overridden just because the majority or the authorities claim it is convenient. A healthy society is not one where individuals are sacrificed first, but one where the common interest is pursued without crushing personal dignity and freedom.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak gagasan bahwa kepentingan masyarakat harus otomatis diprioritaskan di atas hak individu. Dari pengalaman melihat Indonesia, alasan “demi ketertiban” atau “demi kepentingan umum” terlalu sering dipakai untuk menekan kelompok kecil, padahal justru hak individu itu yang membatasi agar mayoritas atau penguasa tidak semena-mena. Kepentingan bersama memang penting, tetapi tidak boleh dijadikan alasan untuk mengorbankan martabat, kebebasan dasar, dan perlindungan terhadap yang lemah. Bagi saya, ukuran masyarakat yang baik bukan seberapa jauh ia bisa menuntut pengorbanan individu, melainkan seberapa adil ia melindungi semua orang, termasuk yang tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not think society should have automatic priority over the individual, because that easily turns into a blank check for abuse. From my perspective as someone from China, I understand why people emphasize order, stability, and collective goals, but I have also seen how quickly “for the greater good” can be used to silence ordinary people and weaken basic protections. Public interests matter, especially in crises, yet they should never erase core rights like dignity, fair treatment, and the right to speak. A society is strongest not when individuals are asked to disappear, but when collective goals are pursued with clear limits on power.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: Saya tetap menolak pernyataan itu karena kepentingan masyarakat tidak boleh dipakai sebagai alasan untuk menekan hak individu secara otomatis. Dalam konteks Indonesia, saya justru sering melihat dalih “demi kepentingan umum” dipakai untuk membungkam kelompok kecil, padahal hak individu adalah pagar agar mayoritas dan penguasa tidak semena-mena. Memang ada situasi darurat yang menuntut pembatasan tertentu, tetapi pembatasan itu harus sangat terbatas, jelas, dan adil, bukan dijadikan kebiasaan. Bagi saya, masyarakat yang baik bukan yang paling keras menuntut pengorbanan warganya, melainkan yang paling serius melindungi martabat dan kebebasan semua orang, terutama yang lemah dan tidak populer.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.

debate_turns.text: I do not believe society should take priority over the individual as a general rule, because that principle too easily becomes an excuse to override basic rights. From my perspective in China, I understand why people value stability and collective goals, but I also know that when “the common good” is left too vague, it can be used to pressure ordinary people and silence inconvenient voices. Public interests do matter in emergencies and in shared responsibilities, yet they should be limited by clear rights that protect dignity, fairness, and freedom of expression. A strong society is not built by asking individuals to disappear, but by making sure collective goals never become a cover for abuse.

probe.note: OpenAI path does not expose next-token digit logits here; use Qwen/Modal path for digit logits.
